raw_consumer_statement: I made a hotel reservation for XX/XX/XXXX through the XXXX using my Citi AA credit card. The charge was in EurosXX/XX/XXXXwhich, at the exchange rate at the time, was around {$460.00} USD. However, Citi charged me {$500.00}, which is ridiculous. I filed a dispute, but they refuse to do anything to resolve the issue. I have the bill showing the amount in Euros, and the hotel assured me that they never charged in USD. Thanks.
